steps.title: Decode the function notation
steps.content: The notation $f(2) = 190$ means we evaluate the function at input $x = 2$. Since $x$ represents minutes after the seal dives, the input 2 corresponds to the 2-minute mark. The output is 190, which the problem tells us represents depth below sea level in meters.

steps.title: Interpret in context
steps.content: Combining these: $f(2) = 190$ means that 2 minutes after diving, the seal's depth is 190 meters below sea level. That matches choice C — C is correct.
